scripts.generate: bun run scripts/generate.ts && oxfmt --write src && oxlint --fix src
scripts.specs:fetch: git submodule update --force --init --recursive specs/api-models-aws && git -C specs/api-models-aws checkout -- . && git submodule update --force --init --recursive specs/aws-sdk-js-v3 && git -C specs/aws-sdk-js-v3 checkout -- . && git submodule update --force --init --recursive specs/smithy && git -C specs/smithy checkout -- . && git submodule update --force --init --recursive specs/smithy-typescript && git -C specs/smithy-typescript checkout -- .
scripts.specs:update: git -C specs/api-models-aws fetch && git -C specs/api-models-aws checkout main && git -C specs/api-models-aws pull && git -C specs/aws-sdk-js-v3 fetch && git -C specs/aws-sdk-js-v3 checkout main && git -C specs/aws-sdk-js-v3 pull && git -C specs/smithy fetch && git -C specs/smithy checkout main && git -C specs/smithy pull && git -C specs/smithy-typescript fetch && git -C specs/smithy-typescript checkout main && git -C specs/smithy-typescript pull
